name: Mori by Art + Flea
tagline: Local fashion, home goods, and art from up-and-coming Hawaii-based artists and designers — each visit feels fresh.
bestTime: First Friday evenings when Chinatown's art walk is happening
talkStory: The brick-and-mortar location of Art + Flea (Hawaii's first urban street market) curates local fashion, home goods, stationery, and art from up-and-coming Hawaii-based artists and designers. The selection changes regularly, so each visit feels fresh. This is where creative Honolulu shops for locally designed T-shirts, prints, ceramics, and accessories you can't find anywhere else.
